content.scenarioHint: 朋友邀请你周末去海边度假，但你最近经济紧张，想礼貌拒绝并表达未来参与的意愿。
content.speakerText: Hey, we’re hitting the beach this weekend—poolside BBQ, sunset walks, the whole vibe. You in?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我们这周末去海边——泳池烧烤、日落散步，全部安排上了。你来吗？
expectedAnswers: That sounds so perfect! I’m really tight on cash this month, but can I join you next time? I’ll bring the drinks!
I love beach trips—honestly, my budget’s on lockdown right now. Let me know when you plan another one, I’m already excited!
Wish I could! I’m focusing on saving up this month, but you’re definitely getting my vote for next getaway!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了拒绝但保留未来参与意愿
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常口语习惯，语气友好
关键词覆盖：使用了 budget / cash / save / next time 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I heard you’re not going on the hiking trip again? Don’t you ever want to get out?
content.speakerTextCn: 我听说你又不去徒步旅行了？你难道从不想出去走走吗？
expectedAnswers: I totally want to! I just need to save up first—next time I’m bringing the best snacks and the most energy!
You’re right, I’ve been staying in too much. I’m working on a travel fund—next trip, I’m in for sure!
I miss adventures so much! Right now, I’m being smart with money, but I’m already planning the next hike with you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应对方质疑，不防御，表达真实愿望
语言准确性：使用正确时态和口语化表达（saving up, I’m in for sure）
表达自然度：语气真诚、积极，避免消极或敷衍
关键词覆盖：使用了 save up / next trip / snacks / adventures 等场景关键词
